diagrams.title: Utilization vs Response Time Curve
diagrams.description: Exponential relationship between server utilization and response time
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why maintaining 70-80% utilization is critical for performance

diagrams.title: Little's Law Triangle
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the relationship between system items, arrival rate, and wait time
elements: Triangle with L at top vertex
Arrows showing multiplication: λ × W → L
Example values shown for web server
diagrams.purpose: Memorize Little's Law formula and its components

diagrams.description: Step-by-step process for quick capacity calculations
diagrams.purpose: Guide for conducting quick capacity assessments

diagrams.title: Amdahl's Law Scaling Chart
diagrams.description: Bar chart showing diminishing returns from parallel processing
diagrams.purpose: Understand scalability limits and plan cost-effective scaling

diagrams.title: Capacity Buffer Composition
diagrams.description: Stacked bar showing how total capacity is composed
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why 20-30% buffer is essential for reliable capacity planning
